# Issue Template — Spike (Research)

```markdown
## Question
<precise question>

## Why Now
<...>

## Expected Output
- [ ] Findings (with citations)
- [ ] Recommendation
- [ ] Optional: PR-ready plan drafted into an Implementation Plan

## Timebox
<e.g., 2 hours of agent work, 1 calendar day>

## Owner
@<owner>
```
